title: Leonohebe propinqua
taxonomy: Leonohebe propinqua is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a member of the genus Leonohebe, which is endemic to New Zealand. The plant is also known as the 'Red or Green Leonohebe', due to its varying leaf colors. The classification of Leonohebe propinqua is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This classification helps to understand the plant's evolutionary history and its relationships with other species.
